import React from "react"; const stats = [ { label: "Documents créés", value: 57, icon: "fas fa-file-alt", color: "blue", }, { label: "Documents validés", value: 32, icon: "fas fa-check-circle", color: "green", }, { label: "Utilisateurs actifs", value: 8, icon: "fas fa-users", color: "purple", }, { label: "Tags utilisés", value: 21, icon: "fas fa-tags", color: "indigo", }, ]; const activity = [ { date: "2023-10-15", user: "Sophie Laurent", action: "a validé le document", target: "De ses lèvres - Chapitre 7", }, { date: "2023-10-12", user: "Thomas Martin", action: "a relu le document", target: "Cahier sœur Henriette MBARGA - Section 3", }, { date: "2023-10-10", user: "Paul Morel", action: "a importé un nouveau document", target: "Cassette audio - Interview Leader 2022", }, ]; const Reports: React.FC = () => (
{/* Statistiques principales */}
{stats.map((stat) => (

{stat.label}

{stat.value}

))}
{/* Graphique d'activité (statique) */}

Activité hebdomadaire

{/* Barres statiques pour l'exemple */}
Lun
Mar
Mer
Jeu
Ven
Sam
Dim
{/* Activité récente */}

Activité récente

    {activity.map((item, idx) => (
  • {item.user}{" "} {item.action}{" "} {item.target}
    {item.date}
    • ))}
); export default Reports
